title: Sabaody’s Cruel World
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Make sure you tell your men, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: B... but if it really is him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'll lose an unimaginable amount of men.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Two legends at the same time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Human Auction will open for Bidding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And of course, our master of ceremonies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And so, let the auction begin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Entry number 1!! from Toroa, West Blue.

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world.
